response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth across multiple senior production roles, explicit AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks) that directly maps to a stated requirement, and a demonstrably strong testing culture reinforced through open-source testing libraries and community workshops. The primary gaps are the complete absence of NestJS in any listed role or project, limited React visibility beyond a single mention at Optilyz, and no explicit reference to Vitest or Jest by name. These are bridgeable gaps worth probing in an interview given the otherwise strong alignment.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js production experience across multiple senior roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital, WatchUp)
Hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role, directly matching an explicitly listed required skill
Proven TDD/testing culture evidenced by open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and publicly delivered testing workshops
concerns: NestJS — listed as a primary stack technology — is entirely absent from all roles, projects, and skills sections
React experience appears shallow, mentioned only once (Optilyz) without any indication of depth or architectural ownership
Vitest and Jest are not named anywhere, leaving specific testing-framework alignment unverified despite strong general TDD evidence
